sources.page_title: Q²M Soft Wipe EVO Towel | Gyeon Quartz USA
sources.cleaned_content:
# Q²M Soft Wipe EVO Towel

**Price:** $8.99

**Size:** 16in x 16in

## Description

Q²M SoftWipe EVO was redeveloped to suit the softest paints on the market. It’s extremely thick, but its gentle fibers are perfect for wiping coatings and all types of quick detailers and spray sealants. It’s the perfect choice for Q²M CeramicDetailer or Q²M Cure. A major benefit is its edgeless trim, now even safer with the ultrasonic cut. The Q²M SoftWipe EVO is plush, thick, and very satisfying to use.

## Features

### LASER CUT
A major benefit of the Q²M SoftWipe EVO is its edgeless trim, making this towel ultra-safe. The Q²M SoftWipe EVO Towel is fabricated using the most advanced laser-cutting technology, making edgeless microfibers very durable against wear.

### SOFT & THICK
Our Q²M SoftWipe EVO fiber was developed to suit even the softest paints on the market. It’s extremely thick, but gentle fibers are perfect for wiping coatings and all types of quick detailers and spray sealants. It’s the perfect choice for our Q²M Cure or its Matte version.

### PRO TIP
When applying a ceramic coating, use the Q²M SoftWipe EVO as the final wipe down towel to remove any excess product from the initial wipe down. Its highly absorbent fibers will absorb any excess and reduce the chance of high spots.

sources.cleaned_content:
# Gyeon Soft Wipe Evo - 16" x 16"

**Price:** $8.99

**Quantity Discounts:** 2+ units at $7.99 (11% savings)

**Available Sizes:** 16" x 16"

## Product Information
- Thick, deep nap, super soft microfiber towel
- Laser cut edgeless design
- 80/20 polyester/polyamide blend
- Product Code: GY-1374

## Product Description

The Gyeon Soft Wipe Evo is a soft, paint safe towel designed to tackle various detailing steps. This thick, deep nap not only feels amazing in your hand, but allows you to easily trap dirt and grime, excess coatings, sealants, waxes, etc. for safe removal from the surface. Gyeon recommends using this towel for wiping away coatings, using quick detailers and applying spray sealants, but it really works great for anything you use it for (i.e. interior cleanings, wax removal, sealant removal, etc.). Soft Wipe features an 80/20 polyester/polyamide blend, heat stamped logo (tagless) and a laser cut edgeless design. Stop waiting, feel the difference of the Gyeon Soft Wipe Evo for yourself!

## From The Label

Q2M SoftWipe Evo was redeveloped to suit the softest paints on the market. It’s extremely thick, but its gentle fibers are perfect for wiping coatings and all types of quick detailers and spray sealants. It’s the perfect choice for Q2M Ceramic Detailer or Q2M Cure. A major benefit is its edgeless trim, now even safer with the ultrasonic cut. The Q2M SoftWipe is plush, thick and very satisfying to use. Wash with Q2M TowelWash regularly.

## Customer Reviews

100% of customers said that they would buy this item again (Based upon 1 rating)

**Review by david c. (2/1/2018) - DI Verified Purchase**
Would they buy this item again? Yes
"Soft and supple, this is a superior towel for product removal, without worrying about scratching."

sources.cleaned_content:
# GYEON Q²M SoftWipe EVO 40 cm × 40 cm

**Price:** 8,00 € (incl. 19% VAT, plus shipping costs)

**ART.NR.:** Q2MSW40

**Rating:** 2 Reviews

## Product Highlights
- Extremely soft and lint-free cloth
- For finishing work with detailers and coatings
- Made in Korea
- Top quality 70/30 - 350 gsm

## Description

The SoftWipe fiber has been developed to be used on even the softest paints available in the market.

The Q²M SoftWipe EVO is extremely thick, but its gentle fibers are perfect for applying sealants, all types of quick detailers, and sealants. It is the ideal choice for the Gyeon Q²M Ceramic Detailer. One main advantage is its edgelessness, which makes the Q²M SoftWipe EVO cloth very safe to use.

The Q²M SoftWipe EVO cloth is manufactured using the most advanced ultrasonic-cutting technology, which makes the edgeless cloth highly resistant to wear.

## Product Safety Information

**Manufacturer information:**
Gyeon Innovative Chemicals PTE LTD
Bukit Batik Crescent 1, Singapur, 658064

**Responsible person:**
carparts GmbH
Vietorstr. 87, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Köln, Deutschland, 51103
info@carparts-koeln.de

## Specifications / Features
- Trader packaging unit: 45 pieces
- Material: 70% polyester / 30% polyamide
- Weight: 350 g/m²
- Dimensions: 40 cm x 40 cm

## Customer Reviews

**Review: "Perfekt" - 5/5**
Perfekt
Wirklich tolle Mikrofaser, ich verwende dieses Tuch besonders zum Polieren nach einem QD
- Teodora M, 25.03.2024 (Verified purchase)

**Review: "Perfekt, nachdem Gyeon beschichten kann" - 5/5**
Tolles Mikrofasertuch. Es ist weich, liegt gut in der Hand und reinigt nach dem Auftragen der Beschichtung perfekt. Ich habe es nach dem Auftragen der Dosenbeschichtung von Gyeon verwendet und es macht einen tollen Job.
- Marko L, 14.06.2025
